narrative_suggested: The image displays a retail setting with various kitchen appliances, suggesting a focus on domestic technology or consumer goods.
description: The image shows a display of kitchenware, including pressure cookers and frying pans, arranged on induction cooktops in what appears to be a retail store. In the background, shelves are stocked with various products, and a few people are visible. A logo for 'UPSC Key' is overlaid on the top right corner of the image.
